ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot interacting with a bank, perhaps making a transaction or inquiring about services.  The sequence will involve a gesture of presenting something (like a card or document) then a gesture of receiving something (like a receipt or card).  The movement will be deliberate and precise, reflecting the seriousness of a financial transaction.  The robot will use both arms, with the left arm presenting something and the right arm receiving something. Frame 1 will have both arms outstretched, palms facing upwards and slightly towards each other in anticipation; Frame 2 will show the left arm extending slightly forward, while the right arm pulls back slightly, as if presenting a document; Frame 3 will show the right arm extending out to receive something; Frame 4 will show both arms returning to a neutral position, indicating the transaction is complete.

frames.beat: arms open wide, palms up, ready for business
left arm presents, right arm pulls back slightly
right arm extends to receive, left arm holds steady
transaction complete, arms return to neutral
